description_long: This is a classic blue sports car with white racing stripes running from the front to the rear, evoking the style of vintage roadsters. The car features a low, aerodynamic body with pronounced wheel arches and side exhaust pipes, giving it a muscular and performance-oriented appearance. The open-top design reveals a two-seat cockpit with gray seats, a wooden steering wheel, and a minimalist dashboard. The front end is characterized by a rounded grille, circular headlights, and a sculpted hood with air vents. The rear showcases rounded taillights, a chrome bumper, and a license plate area, with no visible rear spoiler. The wheels are robust, featuring a five-spoke alloy design, and the overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction typical of high-performance sports cars.
description: A classic blue open-top sports car with white racing stripes, pronounced wheel arches, and a two-seat cockpit. It features a low, aerodynamic body, side exhaust pipes, and five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, open cockpit, side exhaust pipes, and detailed wheel arches.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded grille, dual headlights, and the full length of the white racing stripes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the interior, dashboard, and the continuation of the side exhaust.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded taillights, chrome bumper, license plate area, and the absence of a rear spoiler.
